# TrustField — OSFI E-23 vendor diligence pack (outline)

**Scope:** TrustField Technologies engagements only — **not** a Noetfield product artifact.  
**Noetfield E-23 alignment:** Document Noetfield models in **bank pilots** per [noetfield-future-path.md](../../../docs/strategy/noetfield-future-path.md).

---

## 1. Executive summary (2 pages)

- TrustField legal entity, jurisdiction, ownership
- Services: pre-execution governance engagements — non-PSP where accurate
- Subprocessors, Canada residency
- E-23 control mapping summary

## 2. Service description and boundaries

| Item | Content |
|------|---------|
| SKUs | Trust Brief; Copilot Governance Pack; Bank Pilot |
| Exclusions | Custody, payments, settlement, FX (unless separate licensed contract) |
| Noetfield product | Licensed component **only when** contract names Noetfield — separate diligence exhibit |

## 3–11. Model inventory through procurement checklist

(See prior outline: inventory template, validation, B-10, AI/ML, resilience, privacy, procurement appendix, bank checklist.)
